What We Build

Every
Job Done
Properly.

From foundations to finishing touches, we handle all aspects of construction work across West Yorkshire. No shortcuts, no corners cut — ever.

Start Your Project
01
New Builds

Full new build projects from ground up — high quality homes across West Yorkshire.

02
Extensions

Kitchen, rear and side extensions that seamlessly blend with your existing home.

03
Renovations

Full property refurbishments breathing new life into homes and commercial properties.

04
Retaining Walls

Structural retaining walls combining engineering integrity with quality finishes.

05
Hard Landscaping

Driveways, patios, pathways and external works that complete any project.

06
Project Management

End-to-end management working closely with architects and planners from day one.

07
Foundations

Strip, pad, raft and pile foundations — every project starts with solid ground.

08
Repairs

Structural repairs, brickwork, roofing, drainage — all aspects undertaken.

Who We Are

Huddersfield's
Trusted Builders.

Cornerstone Developments is a distinguished Huddersfield-based construction company with a wealth of experience exceeding two decades. Specialising in new builds, extensions, renovations, retaining walls, and hard landscapes — dedicated to delivering high-quality craftsmanship that exceeds expectations.

  • Fully insured and compliant with all building regulations
  • We work closely with architects and planners from day one
  • Clear communication and transparent, honest pricing
  • Based in Huddersfield, operating across West Yorkshire
  • Every job finished to the standard we'd expect ourselves
